name: Lam Research

screener.note: Valuation score 2.67 exceeds 1 limit (Absolute REJECT: Base CAGR -1% is negative)

bullCase: Lam Research dominates etch and deposition equipment — the two most critical process steps in advanced semiconductor manufacturing. As NAND recovers from its trough and advanced foundry (3D-stacking, gate-all-around) accelerates, Lam's wafer-fab equipment revenue is positioned for a major upcycle. Its high-margin Customer Support Business Group provides a ~$4B recurring revenue floor.
bearCase: Lam's NAND exposure (~40% of revenue) makes it one of the most cyclically volatile names in semiconductor equipment. Memory capex cycles can compress revenue 30-40% within 12 months. US export controls on advanced equipment to China removed ~$1.5B of annual revenue. Any delay in the NAND recovery or GAA adoption pushes out the earnings inflection.
description: Lam Research Corporation designs, manufactures, markets, refurbishes, and services semiconductor processing equipment used in the fabrication of integrated circuits in the United States, China, Kor...
